heading_content_part: . Upon scanning such a code, you will be prompted to add the contact information to your contacts list. In addition, Barcode Scanner can encode a contact as a QR Code and present it on-screen, so that a friend can point their phone at your screen to transfer that contact. This is why the app requests permission to write and read contacts. They are not used in any other way.... my browser history and bookmarks?Just like contacts, you can share a bookmark with a friend byencoding the URL

decoder_heading: It doesn't work with Java 7 / No interface method sort(Ljava/util/Comparator;...
ident_heading: It doesn't work with Java 7 / No interface method sort(Ljava/util/Comparator;...
heading_content_part: as a QR Code. It is then shown on screen for him or her to scan with their phone. That's the only thing we use them for.... my SD card?You can use Barcode Scanner to email a generated QR code or your scan history. To do this, the barcode image / history CSV file must first be written to device storage, which is why the permission is needed. As a bonus, this makes this output available for retrieval from your SD card directly. It is not used for any other purpose.... my wi-fi settings?QR codes can

ident_heading: It doesn't work with Java 7 / No interface method sort(Ljava/util/Comparator;...
heading_content_part: encode the user name, password, etc. for a wi-fi networkso that you don't have to type them into your phone. To do this, the application needs to be able to change wi-fi settings.... the Internet?A few types of scan results will trigger an action to retrieve more information about the result. For example, URL redirectors will be resolved, and web pages will be retrieved up to the title, to give some clue about the destination of the encoded URL before accessing. This needs internet access. Likewise, product and book barcodes will cause a lookup of additional detail about the product or book from internet resources. These can be disabled in settings.

heading_content_part: It doesn't focus or scan on my phoneMost reports of things like this are unfortunately traceable to camera driver problems. This can be true even if other apps like the camera work. The problem is of the form:Barcode Scanner app asks device if it supports feature XDevices reports it supports XBarcode Scanner requests feature XCamera driver does not support it correctly, and fails to initializeAllinitialization including light, focus and other settings fail, making scanning hard or impossibleFirst

heading_content_part: This is built and signed by us, and Google Play uses these signatures to verify that the copy you get is from us. Other app stores, including Amazon, may have a copy of the Barcode Scanner app, but these are not built or maintained by us.Worse still, because this is an open source project, it's easy for a malicious person to add viruses or malware, build and distributed a look-alike copy. For this reason, don't obtain copies from third-party app stores.

heading_content_part: Can we distribute Barcode Scanner, or pre-install it on our Android devices?Yes. The application is distributed under the terms of theApache License 2.0. Distributing the .apk files released by this project complies with the terms of the license, with no further action required. There is no fee. These are the only available license terms.Westrongly

It is signed with the project's keys and so is the only copy that will be upgradeable to future releases via Google Play.The project only maintains a release of Barcode Scanner onGoogle Playand does not maintain releases elsewhere. heading_content_part: The app has always been ad-free and has not been monetized, and will continue to be so. Barcode Scanner will not run ads or otherwise monetize. It is the work of many owners and would be difficult to fairly allocate revenue. It is open source and could be built without ads easily anyway.As a result there is no interest in advertising or paying to promote the app either.I don't get prices from Barcode Scanner, or get very high prices, for some products

It links to Google Product Search and Web Search; contact Google with suggestions.Note that common household items are often available for purchase online, but in bulk quantity. This is an issue to take up with manufacturers or carriers. Sorry, we can't do anything about this.

heading_content_part: Release 3.3.x works with Java 7. 3.4.0 and onwards require Java 8. For Android, that means that 3.3.x should be used if target API levels before 24.
